common.room_editor_intro: Turn on the rooms to include. Drag rooms or use the arrows to set the saved order from top to bottom.

abort.already_configured: This Matic robot is already configured.
abort.already_in_progress: Setup is already in progress. Return to the open setup dialog.
abort.bluetooth_unavailable: Setup requires physical access to the robot and a Bluetooth adapter built into or directly attached to this Home Assistant host. Resolve any Bluetooth repair under Settings → System → Repairs. Bluetooth proxies cannot complete setup.
abort.cannot_connect: Home Assistant could not connect to the robot. Confirm it is powered on and connected to the same network, then try again.
abort.invalid_certificate: The robot's certificate could not be verified.
abort.invalid_credential: The robot rejected the local credential.
abort.pairing_session_expired: The pairing session expired. Start setup again.
abort.reconfigure_successful: The robot connection was updated successfully.

error.cannot_connect: Unable to connect to the robot.
error.bluetooth_unavailable: Setup requires physical access to the robot and a Bluetooth adapter built into or directly attached to this Home Assistant host. Resolve any Bluetooth repair under Settings → System → Repairs. Bluetooth proxies cannot complete setup.
error.invalid_certificate: The robot's certificate could not be verified.
error.invalid_credential: The local access credential is invalid or was not issued for this robot.
error.invalid_passkey: Enter all six digits shown on the robot's screen.
error.pairing_code_expired: That code expired before it was entered. Turn Pairing mode off and back on in the Matic app to show a new code, then enter it immediately.
error.pairing_code_rejected: Matic did not accept that code. Turn Pairing mode off and back on in the Matic app to show a new code, then try again.
error.pairing_mode_off: The robot is not accepting a new local user. Turn on Pairing mode in the Matic app, then try again.
error.pairing_timeout: Home Assistant did not detect Pairing mode. Open Add another user in the Matic app, turn on Pairing mode, and try again.

discovery_failed.description: Home Assistant did not find a Matic robot on this network. Make sure the robot is powered on and connected to the same local network, then retry.
discovery_failed.title: No Matic robot found

select_robot.description: More than one Matic robot was found. Choose the one you want to add.
select_robot.title: Choose your Matic

manual.description: Enter an address only if automatic discovery fails. Home Assistant will still verify the robot and authorize through Bluetooth.
manual.title: Enter the robot's network address

pair.description: In the Matic app, open Settings → Connectivity → Add another user and turn on Pairing mode. Select Submit, then watch the robot for a six-digit code.
pair.title: Connect your Matic

data_description.passkey: Enter the current code. Home Assistant does not save it.

pairing_code.description: Read the six-digit code from the robot and enter it now. Keep this dialog open while pairing completes.
pairing_code.title: Enter the code shown on Matic

reauth_confirm.description: In the Matic app, open Settings → Connectivity → Add another user and turn on Pairing mode. Select Submit to replace Home Assistant's local credential.
reauth_confirm.title: Restore local access

reconfigure.description: Update the robot's local address. Home Assistant verifies the robot before saving the change.
reconfigure.title: Update robot connection

progress.wait_for_pairing: Connecting to Matic. Keep Pairing mode open and watch the robot for a six-digit code.

abort.entry_not_loaded: Configure this Matic robot after it finishes connecting. Home Assistant needs the robot online to manage cleaning plans.

error.confirmation_required: Select the confirmation checkbox to continue.
error.duplicate_plan: A saved plan with this name already exists.
error.invalid_plan: This plan cannot run against the robot's current room map.

init.title: Cleaning plans
init.description: Create reusable room plans for dashboards and automations. {plan_count, plural, =0 {No saved plans} one {# saved plan} other {# saved plans}} · {room_count, plural, one {# mapped room} other {# mapped rooms}} · Selected: {selected_plan}.

manage_plan.title: Choose a cleaning plan
manage_plan.description: Selected: {selected_plan}. Choose a saved plan to review or change.

data_description.plan: Choose the saved plan to inspect or change. The selected plan is identified in the list.

plan_menu.title: Manage cleaning plan
plan_menu.description: {plan_name} · {plan_room_count, plural, one {# selected room} other {# selected rooms}}. Choose what to review or change.

add_plan.title: Create a cleaning plan
add_plan.description: Name the plan, choose how it runs, then turn on any of the robot's {room_count} mapped rooms. Every room starts off. Enabled rooms default to Vacuum and Standard, and all settings save together.

data_description.name: Use a name you will recognize in dashboards and automations, such as Away, Weekdays, or Deep clean.
data_description.run_behavior: Intelligent rotation starts with selected rooms that have waited longest since a successful clean. The saved order breaks ties, so short runs do not always begin with the same rooms. Run all in saved order cleans every selected room once from top to bottom.
data_description.room_editor: Turn on a room to include it and reveal its settings. The list is the exact order for Run all and the tie-break order for Intelligent rotation. Drag rooms or use the arrows to reorder them.
data_description.return_to_base: Send the robot to its dock after the plan finishes.

edit_plan.title: Edit cleaning plan
edit_plan.description: Update the plan's behavior, included rooms, room settings, and saved order on one screen. All changes save together.

data_description.name: The name shown in Home Assistant actions, entities, and plan management.
data_description.run_behavior: Intelligent rotation starts with selected rooms that have waited longest since a successful clean. The saved order breaks ties. Run all in saved order cleans every selected room once from top to bottom.
data_description.room_editor: Turn on a room to include it and reveal its settings. The list is the exact order for Run all and the tie-break order for Intelligent rotation. Drag rooms or use the arrows to reorder them.
data_description.enabled: Disabled plans remain saved and editable but cannot be started.
data_description.return_to_base: Send the robot to its dock after every selected room finishes.

delete_plan.title: Delete cleaning plan
delete_plan.description: This permanently deletes {plan_name}. Cleaning history for unrelated plans is retained.

data.confirm: I understand and want to delete this plan

data_description.confirm: Required safeguard. Leave this off to return without deleting the plan.

preview_plan.title: Preview next run
preview_plan.description: {plan_name} will clean: {next_rooms}. This preview uses the saved behavior and changes nothing.

reset_history.title: Reset intelligent cleaning history
reset_history.description: Clear successful-room tracking for {plan_name}, or every plan. Plans and room settings are never deleted.

data.confirm: I understand and want to reset this history

data_description.all_plans: Off resets only the plan currently being managed. On resets every saved plan.
data_description.confirm: Required safeguard. After reset, every affected room is treated as though it has never completed.

no_robot_target.message: Select at least one loaded Matic vacuum.

no_rooms.message: Select at least one Matic room.

ordered_must_be_boolean.message: Clean in order must be true or false.

plan_already_running.message: A managed Matic cleaning plan is already running.

plan_not_running.message: No managed Matic cleaning plan is running.

invalid_plan.message: The saved cleaning plan is invalid: {error}

robot_unavailable.message: The selected Matic robot is unavailable.

room_plan_unavailable.message: Matic's local room plan is unavailable.

single_robot_required.message: Managed cleaning requires exactly one Matic robot.

rooms_must_be_list.message: Rooms must be a list of room names or IDs.

unsupported_command.message: That Matic command is not supported. Use clean_all, clean_rooms, pause, resume, stop, or return_home.

clean.name: Clean
clean.description: Starts a cleaning run with the selected rooms, mode, coverage, and order.

rooms.name: Rooms
rooms.description: Room names or stable room IDs in the desired order. Leave empty to clean every room.

cleaning_mode.name: Cleaning mode
cleaning_mode.description: Cleaning system to use for this run.

coverage_setting.name: Coverage
coverage_setting.description: Coverage pass to use for this run.

ordered.name: Clean in order
ordered.description: Clean rooms in the supplied order.

intelligent_clean.name: Intelligent cleaning
intelligent_clean.description: Starts with rooms that have waited longest since a successful clean, then continues until stopped or the plan finishes.

plan.name: Cleaning plan
plan.description: Plan name or stable ID. Leave empty to use the selected plan.

clean_entire_plan.name: Clean entire plan
clean_entire_plan.description: Cleans every room using its individual settings and the plan's saved order.

plan.name: Cleaning plan
plan.description: Plan name or stable ID. Leave empty to use the selected plan.

run_selected_plan.name: Run selected plan
run_selected_plan.description: Runs the selected or named plan using its saved cleaning order.

plan.name: Cleaning plan
plan.description: Plan name or stable ID. Leave empty to use the selected plan.

preview_plan.name: Preview next plan run
preview_plan.description: Shows which rooms the next plan run would clean without starting the robot or changing history.

plan.name: Cleaning plan
plan.description: Plan name or stable ID. Leave empty to use the selected plan.

stop_intelligent_cleaning.name: Stop cleaning plan
stop_intelligent_cleaning.description: Stops the plan, leaves the current room due, and sends the robot to its dock.

reset_plan_history.name: Reset cleaning history
reset_plan_history.description: Clears room completion history without deleting plans or room settings.

plan.name: Cleaning plan
plan.description: Plan name or stable ID. Leave empty to use the selected plan.

all_plans.name: Reset every plan
all_plans.description: Clear intelligent-cleaning history for every plan.

list_plans.name: List cleaning plans
list_plans.description: Returns saved plans, rooms, room settings, IDs, and the selected plan.

save_plan.name: Create or replace cleaning plan
save_plan.description: Creates a plan or replaces an existing plan with the same ID.

plan_id.name: Plan ID
plan_id.description: Stable ID to replace; omit to derive it from the name.

run_behavior.name: Cleaning order
run_behavior.description: Intelligent rotation cleans the longest-waiting rooms first. Run all cleans every selected room from the top of the room list to the bottom.

rooms.name: Rooms and settings
rooms.description: Ordered mapped rooms with individual cleaning mode and coverage settings.

start_timeout.name: Start timeout
start_timeout.description: Seconds to wait for each room to start cleaning.

completion_timeout.name: Room completion timeout
completion_timeout.description: Seconds to wait for each room to finish.

delete_plan.name: Delete cleaning plan
delete_plan.description: Deletes one plan by stable ID or exact name.

plan.name: Cleaning plan
plan.description: Stable plan ID or exact name.

select_plan.name: Select cleaning plan
select_plan.description: Selects the plan used by entities and buttons.

plan.name: Cleaning plan
plan.description: Stable plan ID or exact name.

save_plan_room.name: Add or update plan room
save_plan_room.description: Adds one mapped room or updates that room's individual settings.

plan.name: Cleaning plan
plan.description: Stable plan ID or exact name.

room.name: Room and settings
room.description: Mapped room with its cleaning mode and coverage setting.

delete_plan_room.name: Remove room from plan
delete_plan_room.description: Removes one mapped room and its settings from a plan.

plan.name: Cleaning plan
plan.description: Stable plan ID or exact name.

room.name: Room
room.description: Mapped room name or stable room ID.

move_plan_room.name: Move room in plan
move_plan_room.description: Changes one mapped room's saved position.

plan.name: Cleaning plan
plan.description: Stable plan ID or exact name.

room.name: Room
room.description: Mapped room name or stable room ID.

fetch_hermes_collection.name: Fetch Hermes collection
fetch_hermes_collection.description: Reads a size-limited snapshot from a supported local Hermes collection. Credential collections are blocked.

collection.name: Collection
collection.description: Local Hermes property or collection to inspect.

include_payload.name: Include payload
include_payload.description: Include size-limited raw key/value bytes in the response.

payload_format.name: Payload format
payload_format.description: Encoding used when raw payloads are included.

max_bytes.name: Maximum bytes
max_bytes.description: Maximum bytes included from each key and value.
